about.title: About
about.subtitle: My Journey
about.description:
I have been working in the software industry since 2007. During this time, I have held positions as Software Developer, Senior Software Developer, and Team Lead.

I possess extensive experience in software development. I have developed web (frontend & backend) and Android (Xamarin) applications using object-oriented programming, software design patterns, principles, methodologies, and various development tools. I leverage my technical and analytical skills to solve problems both independently and as part of a team.

Until 2024, I worked as a Fullstack Developer, and since then, I have continued my career as a Principal Software Specialist, focusing on Frontend development. Throughout my career, I have been working with technologies such as Angular, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: My technical skills include modern web technologies, backend architectures, and DevOps tools.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey spans over {{years}} years, encompassing leadership in software development processes, architectural design, and end-to-end product development.

etiya.desc: Leading the frontend architecture and development of enterprise telecommunications software. Adding and modifying new features based on customer requests. Developing products from scratch based on customer requirements.

virtudev.desc: Managing the development team and contributing to full-stack feature development. Attending meetings related to system architectures, conducting code reviews, and ensuring timely project delivery.

univera.desc: Web-based software development in the field of supply chain management. Making improvements to customer communication software based on customer requests, adding new features, optimizing database queries, and operating user interfaces.

agito.desc: Insurance sector software development. New system installation in customer environments and upgrade of existing old software to new version.

doganata.desc: Working on Ceomed software. Developing new features and maintaining existing ones. Creating custom forms and reports for clients.

birim.desc: Hospital Information Management System (HIMS) software development.

enum2array.title: Enum2Array
enum2array.description: A function to help converting enums to an array. Define an enum then use this function to convert that enum to an array.

storage-function.title: Storage Function
storage-function.description: A function to manipulate browser storages. Such as store a key value pair to session or local storage, getting key value pairs from local or session storage. You can check all available functions for more details.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro
pomodoro.description: A simple Pomodoro timer application to help you manage your time effectively using the Pomodoro Technique.

coverage-guard.title: Coverage Guard
coverage-guard.description: Automates test coverage checks and ensures 100% coverage for JavaScript/TypeScript projects by generating missing tests.

flaky-test-detector.title: Flaky Test Detector
flaky-test-detector.description: Detects and fixes flaky tests across various test runners, ensuring stable CI performance and reliable test outcomes.
